2024-25 Cal State Fullerton Titans Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 6-26 (1-19, 11th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Dedrique Taylor

PS/G: 63.2 (358th of 364)

PA/G: 77.3 (316th of 364)

SRS: -15.96 (350th of 364)

SOS: 0.37 (129th of 364)

ORtg: 92.0 (361st of 364)

DRtg: 112.5 (341st of 364)
